steps.title: Use the clam evidence
steps.content: The records show clam size and productivity increased as clam garden practices became more common and harvesting pressure increased. That supports a conclusion about the effectiveness of the practice.

steps.title: Infer sustainability
steps.content: A concerns contemporary continuity, B invents an origin for the practice, and D contradicts the increased harvesting pressure. Bigger, more productive clams under greater use support sustainable food production. The answer is C.
